name: Nescafé
description: The world's most consumed coffee brand, dominating the instant coffee market globally.

name: Starbucks
description: The undisputed leader in the global coffeehouse industry and premium retail beans.

name: Nespresso
description: The global gold standard for portioned espresso and high-end capsule systems.

name: Folgers
description: The top-selling retail ground coffee brand in the United States by volume.

name: Lavazza
description: Italy's premier coffee brand and a global leader in espresso culture.

name: Jacobs
description: One of Europe's most popular brands, leading markets in Germany, Austria, and Eastern Europe.

name: Costa Coffee
description: The second largest coffee chain in the world, with a massive presence in Europe and Asia.

name: Maxwell House
description: A historic American mass-market leader known for its widespread retail accessibility.

name: Dunkin'
description: A powerhouse in the US coffee market, known for high-speed service and loyal daily drinkers.

name: Tim Hortons
description: Dominates the Canadian market with nearly 80% share of the quick-service coffee sector.
